data.Modification: Iodoacetamide derivative/Addition of Glycine/Addition of G
Loss of O2; nitro photochemical decomposition

project.title: Toxoplsama gondii Cdt1 homolg interactome
project.projectDescription: Toxoplasma endodyogeny is governed by a set of Cdk-related kinases (Crk). In this study we investigated TgCrk4 and its cyclin partner TgCyc4. This complex regulates many cell cycle related processes at the G2 phase. We identified an interactor of this complex TgCdt1 and analyzed its interactome using proteomic studies.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Protein samples were prepared for mass spectrometry-based proteomic anlysis using s-traps. Proteins were reduced with 20uM dithiothreitol(DTT) for 10 minutes, at 95 celcius. This step was followed by alkylation with 40uM Iodoacetamide (IAA) for 30 minutes. Proteins were then acidified using phosphoric acid and combined with s-trap loading buffer (90% methanol, 100mM triethylammonium bicarbonate). Proteins were s-traps, washed, and digested with trypsin/Lys-C overnight at 37 celcius. Peptides were eluted, dried and resuspended in water-0.1% acetonitrile-0.1% formic acid. The resulting peptides were then analyzed using liquid chromatoghraphy tandem mass spectrometry (LC-MS/MS).
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Raw data files were processed using MaxQuant and searched against the current Toxoplasma gondii ME49 protein sequence database from ToxoDB. The Signifigance Analysis of INTeractome (SAINT) was used to identify TgCdt1 interactors with default setting paramter in function SAINT express version. Proteomes of the parental strain were incorperated to accout for non-specific binding.

references.referenceLine: Hawkins LM, Wang C, Chaput D, Batra M, Marsilia C, Awshah D, Suvorova ES. The Crk4-Cyc4 complex regulates G<sub>2</sub>/M transition in Toxoplasma gondii. EMBO J. 2024 43(11):2094-2126

Comment[Instrument]: hybrid quadrupole-Orbitrap instrument (Q Exactive Plus, Thermo Fisher Scientific)
Comment[AcquisitionMethod]: Full MS survey scans were acquired at 70,000 resolution. The top ten most abundant ions were selected for MS/MS analysis.
Comment[EnrichmentMethod]: Extracted proteins were incubated with α-HA or α-myc magnetic beads (MblBio).
